title: A Missing Ingredient in Ukraine’s Barrages on Russia: Ballistic Missiles
summary_full: Ukrainian drone attacks have achieved breakthroughs, but only ballistic missiles can push Russia to reconsider its war objectives, military experts and officials say.
summary_public: Ukrainian drone attacks have achieved breakthroughs, but only ballistic missiles can push Russia to reconsider its war objectives, military experts and officials say.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: push Russia to reconsider its war objectives
